recentTweets.text:
Like Bernie, I’ve been fighting for working families my entire life, and like Bernie, I won’t back down or ask for permission to do what’s right.

Join me! https://t.co/qCqxeU9VDz
Me, reading reports that lack of childcare and school closures doesn’t drive economic and employment outcomes. https://t.co/jTQIpFdsSw

So excited to join the team at the Women’s Bureau! Women, particularly women of color, have taken the brunt of the economic, health, and educational hit in this pandemic. A real recovery has to tackle the challenges for this group head on. Excited to take on the challenge!!

That’s it. There’s nothing left for me to do, but to pack my bags, stop the presses, pull the plug, exit stage left...  I’m on a list with @BernieSanders @SenWarren @AyannaPressley and @AOC??? DM me your addresses, because this is gonna be my a Holiday card.

Completely unrelated to anything you’re following today, but take a moment to watch my almost 4yr old get his first basket!! 
His joy is contagious! ❤️ https://t.co/kSjViQyPyX

There have been many hot takes on the Bernie Biden taskforces, and more will continue to come, but the bottom line is that we are magical but not actual magic. Bernie taskforce appointees pushed on EVERY issue @BernieSanders stood for with tenacity.

The reality is that progressives must continue to build the momentum necessary in order to achieve the policies we want and need. None of us believe where we are now is sufficient. But we cannot afford to pack it up without trying to move the ball further and further. #LongGame

I wish we could #BernItDown and move an agenda that immediately guarantees  justice to all, but we would be foolish to not take every opportunity we have to erode the obstacles that stand before us with persistence and grit.

My 93 yr old dad excited to finally cast his vote for ⁦@BernieSanders⁩!!
❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️ https://t.co/a9zAJvzlNx

We all know one candidate/person/elected cannot do it alone. I couldn’t be prouder of continuing to work w/ ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ to build the progressive power we need at every level of government.  🐜 🐜 🐜  https://t.co/yBvTiZIw5F

Yesterday my son watched part of the horrifying video of George Floyd’s murder. I suspect he was curious, & googled his name to understand why we were so angry. He spent most of the day in tears & all I could do was hold him. This was the hardest shit I’ve ever had to navigate.
Quick, name one policy Joe Biden is campaigning on (that isn’t Obama nostalgia).
I appreciate @TomSteyer and his earnestness. But now I’d like to see that commitment towards racial justice and fighting climate change go behind the candidate with the plan and momentum to win!
Man, that’s a good slogan @ChuckRocha! Whomever made it deserves a tray of cookies!! #IShouldDoThisForALiving #ChuckListens https://t.co/lOThfQiwxf

I love the ridiculousness of this sooooo much! 

Y’all do know Massachusetts and Minnesota voters VOTE ON TUESDAY, right??

Poverty almost destroyed my family. My mother still tears up about having to let got of her daughters because she couldn’t work &care for my sick father. @glennbeck could have read the @TheAtlantic article or spoken to @mollyesque. Instead he misrepresents my truth.

Wow... @glennbeck - way to (intentionally) get the story WRONG.
When my mother was pregnant with me, my father fell at his factory job and BROKE HIS BACK. They were so poor (no insurance, no savings, nothing) my mother had to send my 1 yr old sister to live with my grandmother

When I was born, my mother had to send me away to my grandmother - BECAUSE SHE COULDNT AFFORD TO KEEP HER CHILDREN, despite working two jobs and cleaning houses. 40 years after getting us “back” my mother still recounts the pain poverty inflicted on her. As a mother, I understand

In American, @glennbeck, both then &now, poverty tears people apart. Mothers lose children, children lose futures, families break. My story of being “sent to live on the side of a mountain”(in a earthquake prone country) is about how poor people are forced to make awful choices

I’m flying back home to see my 93yr old dad who’s been hospitalized for the 5th X since the start of the campaign

Each time, I can count on 2 things: 
1. Medicare will pay the bills 
2. He will remind me that he wants  @BernieSanders to win.

I dread not having both those things https://t.co/EFjf27g3rw

Just a few friends, hanging on a Sunday afternoon to deliver #NevadaCaucus for ⁦@BernieSanders⁩! Block by block canvassing, that’s how we win! ⁦@LasVegasDSA⁩ ⁦@amy4thepeople⁩ ⁦@CoriBush⁩ ⁦@keithellison⁩ ⁦@NationalNurses⁩ https://t.co/AOAY2ShyEZ

Every single person who says the differences between candidates don’t matter, swim in an ocean of privilege. Uncrushed by medical and student debt. Unbothered by a criminal justice system that destroys black lives at an appalling rate. Blind to the daily injustice poverty brings.

Iowa recap: The Jewish,son of an immigrant, WON Iowa by prioritizing justice thru a program led by a young woman, a campaign managed by a young Muslim and advised by a crazy cowboy hat wearing Latino. Just saying... #JuntosConBernie @BernieSanders @fshakir @ChuckRocha @mistyrebik

I’m going to Nevada!! And South Carolina, Cali, and Texas, and Tennessee, and Virginia, Oklahoma, Minnesota, Colorado, Maine, Massachusetts, Washington, Alabama, Arkansas, North Carolina and Utah!!! In that order..
I couldn’t be prouder...
Our star political intern, Allison Tovar got straight A’s this semester while working to elect ⁦@BernieSanders⁩! We couldn’t be prouder of her efforts! Way to go sister!!!! https://t.co/Jto0OD30Ek

Bottom line tonight:
Bernie is unbought.
Bernie is always bold
Bernie has your back
Bernie can beat Trump
Bernie will win!!
I’m so proud of my fellow movement makers! Congrats  @CosechaMovement @MaketheRoadNJ and every single person who worked on this for close to two decades!
Town by town, inch by inch, this is how we are going to win! @BernieSanders #WomenForBernie @DrDooleyMD @amy4thepeople https://t.co/QyUBztmPWW
I’m almost 43, and I’m a big fan of @BernieSanders
I think I’ve turned him into a @BernieSanders billboard! #BernieBabies #DoIt4Them https://t.co/UYUfXmuaPK

Finally made it home; my kids, parents &husband are all asleep. I head back out to PA tomorrow, CA after that. Despite how hard it is, the idea of building a better future for all of us w/ @BernieSanders is THE best motivator to keep on moving.

Here’s the only recap you need:

Bernie is the only one who will fight for you, no matter what.

Seriously though....
👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽

Bernie 👏🏽Sanders 👏🏽Is 👏🏽the👏🏽most👏🏽 Progressive👏🏽Presidential 👏🏽Candidate👏🏽—But You Wouldn’t Know It From the News  https://t.co/N0QxUJhSut

Like @BernieSanders, #IKnowWhereICameFrom My mother, a Colombian nurse who lost siblings to poverty and violence, My 93 yr old Dominican father, who survived a fascist dictator, &immigrated in order to give my sister, me and now their grandchildren a shot at a better life. https://t.co/xS0FXQjwn9

Today, @BernieSanders sets the bar on how we fix our broken immigration system
📍 Fufilling our promise to DACA, DAPA, asylum seekers
📍 Ensuring access to healthcare, education and housing
📍 Protecting the rights of workers here and abroad
📍Stopping the terror of ICE
1/2
Bernie blackout? What??! No... you’re totally imagining it.

Whenever I need a reminder of why Bernie is singular amongst many, in alignment with me and my community, and simply the best candidate for the kind of President I would like to see in the White House, I watch this.... I don’t need many reminders however.

Let’s be clear. ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ policies uplift ALL my people. My Black, Latinx, and Asian sisters and brothers. White folk, Brown folk, all folk. 

Why? Because we are focused on dismantling injustice for all people.   https://t.co/kOrXwPRSDE
Two powerful Criminal Justice reformers!
No one is more focused on Main Street rather than Wall Street, than @BernieSanders
Shout out to the best political team, working hard every day to bring more people into the #BernieSquad! ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ Fights for Us! https://t.co/t11VhLhIgJ
Apparently the internet thinks mini @Trevornoah endorsed @BernieSanders and I can’t stop laughing @shaunking https://t.co/q69WK3rTXA
I just woke my husband up to read ⁦@krystalball⁩’s opinion piece on why AOC decided to pick sides in 2020 election.  #MarriageGoals  https://t.co/aNmdQxI0Fa
Never too early to make your kids part of the political revolution! https://t.co/IAOJviEAFV

Beg, borrow and steal much?
This level of Revisionist History is DISGUSTING. Straight up  #StealingTheBern 

As my MIL would say, Bless her heart, @jess_mc ain’t got no sense...
This is almost comical.... why not lead with #BernieBeatsTrump ??? https://t.co/3v8pJh6l0E

Why Bernie? Because only bold action can upend systems built to divide, conquer and oppress. 

Why now? Because our planet, society, nation and democracy depend on it.

#BernieSquad #BerninBrownGirls https://t.co/xoOLV7vs2c

So proud to stand with such an amazing, powerful woman like Rep @IlhanMN. 
#BerniesGoingToWin #BernieSquad
.@BernieSanders is going to win!
We will fight. We will win. Because we must.
I can’t say enough great things about this great man. Just humbled by the strength, commitment and relentlessness of this incredible leader.   #BernieStrong #Medicare4All

During this campaign, I’ve had to grapple w/my father’s cancer diagnosis. 
It’s been awful. Mostly because I never want to let go, but also because, as many immigrant children, I must navigate his care because of language barriers. 
One thing has been 100000% easy. Medicare.

Taking off my campaign hat 🧢 

As a woman of color, a product of the African diaspora, the mother of 2 black boys &as a person who believes in calling out hate, racism, sexism, oppression. I call BS!!
To ask about appropriation is not racist, &saying this hurts our communities.
This is the most bizarre, revisionist history, turd sandwich of a tweet. 💩

There is ZERO room for hate or racists in our movement. Forget the fact that the indomitable ⁦@ninaturner⁩ the tireless ⁦@briebriejoy⁩ or myself would rain down against it. ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ has spent an entire lifetime fighting  4 justice https://t.co/Xjkt1xt3IZ

Thrilled to listen to two powerful activists discuss the multiple layers and intersectionality of racial and economic oppression.  Plus, #ThoseHats @rashadrobinson @ColorOfChange #VotingWhileBlack https://t.co/05SGUNYjv7

I can’t say it enough.

Bernie’s ideas are BOLD
Bernie’s ideas are INTERSECTIONAL
Bernie’s ideas are TRANSFORMATIVE
Bernie’s ideas are BAD ASS
Bernie’s ideas are APPROPRIATED BY ER’BODY

assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

Raise your hand if you HATE arguing with insurance companies, worrying about whether you’ll be covered, postponing care, or rationing your care or medicine??!!! #BerniePuede #MedicareForAll
Happy Birthday to the one and only @BernieSanders!! https://t.co/s0EBEZp8Mp
Today, thousands of @BernieSanders supporters are out in full force in over 60 Labor Day events, proving we put our values into action. Each day, every day. #BernieSolidarity #LaborDay

For years many like ⁦@ACLU⁩ ⁦@ColorOfChange⁩ ⁦@BLMNational⁩ ⁦@Dreamdefenders⁩ have called for bold change to ensure a fair justice system. ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ plan to transform every aspect of a broken &racist system, delivers. https://t.co/b9S33ee95R

How much clearer can it be?
@BernieSanders supports raising wages, transitioning to a green economy, stopping climate change, reforming criminal justice system, protecting a woman’s right to choose, Medicare, college and justice for all. And recognizes we are in it together.

I’m convinced that the greatest preparation I ever had for my current role with ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ and how to keep pushing &building despite the OBVIOUS and INTENTIONAL misrepresentation by MSM is the time wasted with gas lighting awful boyfriends.  https://t.co/Bjv2BxhVqz

For three weeks I’ve been trying to get my father’s medical records so I can seek treatment for a cancer diagnosis. For three weeks @JFKMedicalNJ has FAILED my 92 yr old dad. I’ve begged and cried and begged some more. Please retweet and maybe you can help nudge them into action. https://t.co/xdwvfIEFz7

We believe. We believe that we. We believe that we shall win!!! 

⁦@BernieSanders⁩ #SiSePuede!! ⁦@mrdannyglover⁩ ⁦@ninaturner⁩ ⁦@GunnelsWarren⁩ ⁦@davidsirota⁩ https://t.co/wCh1qo9AJw

Tonight I’m all about, #IWroteTheDamnBill @BernieSanders
Bankers still trying to buy elections with the candidates they see easiest to manipulate towards their interests. Notably, Bernie and Warren absent from said mix.

Ugh...WT Flying F!?! ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ CHANGES his plans in order to stand w/ workers and the story turns into he is a Johnnie come lately on $15?! How about he’s sponsored the 1st bill to raise the wage 4 years ago!? Is that enough lead time for you? https://t.co/MvD4LiPgFA

I’m completely disgusted by this. Maligning a person, without fact or merit is one thing. But to then say @BernieSanders is anti-woman?!? Based on what? Last I checked women went to college, needed healthcare, needed better wages, a safer environment, justice &fairness!!

Only action can stop the profit vultures who put profits before people and aim to shut down #HahnemannHospital ⁦⁦@BernieSanders⁩ ⁦⁦@PennaNurses⁩ ⁦@1199CNUHHCE⁩ working together to #SaveOurCare #SaveHanemann https://t.co/IB4dEhrwKD

I really ❤️ how a white man says ⁦⁦@BernieSanders⁩ can’t connect w/people of color, considering I spent yesterday watching Bernie get a standing ovation in a room full of Latinx &cheered on by a room full of black activists. https://t.co/OAJ0dXpgZz
We win, when workers get the fairness and workplace justice they deserve. #UnionForAll @BernieSanders @SEIU @CMRJBWU https://t.co/rGHm2KKCBN

This is HILARIOUS, considering @BernieSanders spurred the momentum towards increasing the minimum wage to $15. One of the first increases to $10 happens TOMORROW in NJ and hundreds of thousands of people will benefit. Silly boy...
Glad to see Keith Ellison Endorse  Bernie Sanders For President!  https://t.co/n4raimfjzK
Team @BernieSanders feeling fired up for tonight!! #DemDebate #Medicare4All #College4All #Justice4All https://t.co/6aH7bVnYof

I’m calling this debate right now.
Hand down winner???
@BernieSanders 2016 Platform
#DemocratDebate #Medicare4All #College4All #Justice4All

It’s incredible to see the number of people who oppose cancelling student debt, Medicare for All, College for All or other universal programs because they don’t think others “deserve it”. It’s a special kind of selfish to deny yourself, just to keep something from someone else..

Student debt can deter you from moving, marriage, children, buying a home, choosing a particular career, leaving an unhappy, unhealthy or dangerous situation and overall limits whatever you desire to do for a decade or so. Want an economic reboot? #CancelStudentDebt

Thousands of NJ teachers &public workers stand together to demand millionaires pay their fair share. Fair budgets shouldn’t be balanced on the backs of workers! #StandWithWorkers #WhichSideAreYouOn?
⁦@CWA_NJ⁩ ⁦@CWAUnion⁩ ⁦@NJEA⁩ ⁦@NEAsg ⁦@BernieSanders⁩ https://t.co/Dut0UpDk4s
